title: Kaupen's Ancient Trades
description: Kaupen's Ancient Trades adds multiple Trades to the Wandering Trader. All trades done with new Ancient Coins found in suspicious sand.
body:
![Kaupen's Ancient Trades Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Mqosjdn5/images/432a7f27ec75ae216770038b4b18f71e5942a0d1.png)

**Lore**:
_Long, long ago before Emeralds were used as a currency, an unknown denomination of coin was widespread throughout the now lost empires! These coins can be dug up and still found. Some find them far more valuable than Emeralds too!_

![Ancient Coin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a4b79a3fafb5c7e802845bdbd18bcf70e806cac.png)

If you encounter a Wandering Trader, they might offer you magic, you cannot conceive of! But the price may be steep! Ancient coins are hard to come by! 

**Description**: Find Ancient Coin Fragments [And rarely whole Ancient Coins ] in Suspicious Sand (Only in Desert Pyramids on Fabric). 
The Wandering Trader rarely trades Ancient Coins for enchantments above the normal level cap![Digging up an ancient coin fragment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ee8cc29d0b0fabd83015dbf847836f306c8c99f_0.webp)

**Current Trades**: 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

8 Coins for Efficiency VI

12 Coins for Protection IV, Fire Protection IV, Blast Protection IV or Projectile Protection IV

16 Coins for Sharpness VI

32 Coins for Fortune IV 

32 Coins for Looting VI (YES! 6!)

![Wandering Trader, Trading for an Efficiency VI book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5b8e3f6340b52961dbabb97fab4a5f5877f31d1.png)
</details>

**All trades are configurable.**
